channel.title: Bitcoin UTXO Snapshots - RSS Feed for Torrent Files
channel.description: This RSS Feed provides Bitcoin UTXO snapshots and assume UTXO files for mainnet, testnet4, and signet networks. Perfect for node operators who want to quickly sync their Bitcoin nodes using trusted snapshots.

item.title: utxo-bitcoin-mainnet-840000
item.description: Assume UTXO snapshot for Bitcoin mainnet at height 840000. Contains 176.94M transaction outputs with 19.68M BTC supply. UTXO set size: 12 GB. Best block: 689B F23F 1CDA 83A5, MuHash: 0467 BC5E 4265 A637.

item.title: utxo-snapshot-bitcoin-mainnet-902949
item.description: Pruned UTXO snapshot for Bitcoin mainnet at height 902949. Contains 168M transaction outputs with 19.88M BTC supply. UTXO set size: 11 GB. Best block: 3C48 2D14 EA85 180E, MuHash: 557D 8411 5A31 5D12.

item.title: utxo-snapshot-bitcoin-testnet4-88776
item.description: Full node UTXO snapshot for Bitcoin testnet4 at height 88776. Includes txindex, coinstatsindex, and blockfilterindex. Contains 12.92M transaction outputs with 4.43M BTC supply. UTXO set size: 908 MB. Best block: 867B F034 F2C7 8713, MuHash: BA85 FFC4 F85C 6BFD.

item.title: utxo-snapshot-bitcoin-signet-258521
item.description: Full node UTXO snapshot for Bitcoin signet at height 258521. Includes txindex, coinstatsindex, and blockfilterindex. Contains 33.65M transaction outputs with 11.71M BTC supply. UTXO set size: 2 GB. Best block: B9F6 28F8 09AD A1D6, MuHash: ADCD 6186 4CEB EDBA.
